summary:
The child has a large kidney stone causing pain and blood in urine; treatment should start with non-invasive options like ESWL due to its efficacy and safety profile in pediatric patients. Alternative surgical approaches are reserved unless first-line therapy fails. Summary:

The child has significant symptoms likely caused by a mid-sized kidney stone; initiate conservative treatments such as ESWL which offers effective relief while minimizing risk. Consider surgery only if less invasive therapies fail.
